ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., B.Arch, B.Tech) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in years */,
  "min_credits_required" INTEGER /* Minimum credits required to graduate */,
  "max_credits_allowed" INTEGER /* Maximum credits allowed per semester */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total seats available for admission */,
  "fees_per_semester" TEXT /* Fees per semester for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam (e.g., JEE-Main, JEE-Advanced) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the exam (e.g., General, Special) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the exam was conducted */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cutoffs" (
  "cutoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cutoff record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "cutoff_rank" TEXT /* Cutoff rank required for admission */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the cutoff is applicable */,
  "cutoff_score" TEXT /* Cutoff score required for admission */,
  "last_rank_admitted" INTEGER /* Last rank admitted in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cutoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cutoffs_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cutoffs_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the student (e.g., General, OBC, SC/ST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score obtained by the student in the exam */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank obtained by the student in the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of admission */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of admission (e.g., Admitted, Not Admitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Faculty, Student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_centers" (
  "exam_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam center */,
  "exam_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the exam center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the exam center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_center_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation record */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "exam_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_center_allocations_exam_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_center_id") REFERENCES exam_centers ("exam_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_center_allocations_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)
